mapper.select: SELECT '不及格' as zuoyechengji,case when t.不及格 is null then 0 else t.不及格 end total from (select sum(case when zuoyechengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 60 and zuoyechengji <= 70 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 70 and zuoyechengji <= 80 then 1 else 0 end) as 中等, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 80 and zuoyechengji <= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 良好, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 优秀 from zuoyepigai 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '及格' as zuoyechengji,case when t.及格 is null then 0 else t.及格 end total from (select sum(case when zuoyechengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 60 and zuoyechengji <= 70 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 70 and zuoyechengji <= 80 then 1 else 0 end) as 中等, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 80 and zuoyechengji <= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 良好, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 优秀 from zuoyepigai 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '中等' as zuoyechengji,case when t.中等 is null then 0 else t.中等 end total from (select sum(case when zuoyechengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 60 and zuoyechengji <= 70 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 70 and zuoyechengji <= 80 then 1 else 0 end) as 中等, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 80 and zuoyechengji <= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 良好, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 优秀 from zuoyepigai 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '良好' as zuoyechengji,case when t.良好 is null then 0 else t.良好 end total from (select sum(case when zuoyechengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 60 and zuoyechengji <= 70 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 70 and zuoyechengji <= 80 then 1 else 0 end) as 中等, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 80 and zuoyechengji <= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 良好, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 优秀 from zuoyepigai 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '优秀' as zuoyechengji,case when t.优秀 is null then 0 else t.优秀 end total from (select sum(case when zuoyechengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 60 and zuoyechengji <= 70 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 70 and zuoyechengji <= 80 then 1 else 0 end) as 中等, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 80 and zuoyechengji <= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 良好, sum(case when zuoyechengji >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) as 优秀 from zuoyepigai 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t
